revision.text:
{{navbar|Glossary templates see also|plain=y}}
* {{tlx|glossary}} {{aka}} {{tlx|glossary start}} or {{tlx|glossary begin}} – Half of a template pair; uses {{tag|dl|o}} with a class to open the structured glossary definition list that {{tnull|glossary end}} closes. * {{tlx|glossary end}} – The other half of this template pair; uses {{tag|dl|c}} to close the definition list that {{tnull|glossary}} opens. * {{tlx|term}} – The glossary term to which the {{tnull|defn}} definition applies; a customized {{tag|dt|o}} with a class and an embedded {{tag|dfn|o}}. * {{tlx|defn}} – The definition that applies to the {{tnull|term}}; uses {{tag|dd|o}} with a class * {{tlx|ghat}} – a hatnote template properly formatted for the top of a {{tnull|defn}} definition * {{tlx|glossary link}} – meta-template for creating shortcut templates for linking to definitions in specific glossaries * [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Glossaries]] {{documentation}}

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
{{navbar|Glossary templates see also|plain=y}}
* {{tlx|glossary}} {{aka}} {{tlx|glossary start}} or {{tlx|glossary begin}} – Half of a template pair; uses {{tag|dl|o}} with a class to open the structured glossary definition list that {{tnull|glossary end}} closes. * {{tlx|glossary end}} – The other half of this template pair; uses {{tag|dl|c}} to close the definition list that {{tnull|glossary}} opens. * {{tlx|term}} – The glossary term to which the {{tnull|defn}} definition applies; a customized {{tag|dt|o}} with a class and an embedded {{tag|dfn|o}}. * {{tlx|defn}} – The definition that applies to the {{tnull|term}}; uses {{tag|dd|o}} with a class * {{tlx|ghat}} – a hatnote template properly formatted for the top of a {{tnull|defn}} definition * {{tlx|glossary link}} – meta-template for creating shortcut templates for linking to definitions in specific glossaries * [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Glossaries]] {{documentation}} [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
{{navbar|Glossary templates see also|plain=y}}
* {{tlx|glossary}} {{aka}} {{tlx|glossary start}} or {{tlx|glossary begin}} – Half of a template pair; uses {{tag|dl|o}} with a class to open the structured glossary definition list that {{tnull|glossary end}} closes. * {{tlx|glossary end}} – The other half of this template pair; uses {{tag|dl|c}} to close the definition list that {{tnull|glossary}} opens. * {{tlx|term}} – The glossary term to which the {{tnull|defn}} definition applies; a customized {{tag|dt|o}} with a class and an embedded {{tag|dfn|o}}. * {{tlx|defn}} – The definition that applies to the {{tnull|term}}; uses {{tag|dd|o}} with a class * {{tlx|ghat}} – a hatnote template properly formatted for the top of a {{tnull|defn}} definition * {{tlx|glossary link}} – meta-template for creating shortcut templates for linking to definitions in specific glossaries * [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Glossaries]] {{documentation}}

{{navbar|Glossary templates see also|plain=y}}
* {{tlx|glossary}} {{aka}} {{tlx|glossary start}} or {{tlx|glossary begin}} – Half of a template pair; uses {{tag|dl|o}} with a class to open the structured glossary definition list that {{tnull|glossary end}} closes. * {{tlx|glossary end}} – The other half of this template pair; uses {{tag|dl|c}} to close the definition list that {{tnull|glossary}} opens. * {{tlx|term}} – The glossary term to which the {{tnull|defn}} definition applies; a customized {{tag|dt|o}} with a class and an embedded {{tag|dfn|o}}. * {{tlx|defn}} – The definition that applies to the {{tnull|term}}; uses {{tag|dd|o}} with a class * {{tlx|ghat}} – a hatnote template properly formatted for the top of a {{tnull|defn}} definition * {{tlx|glossary link}} – meta-template for creating shortcut templates for linking to definitions in specific glossaries * [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Glossaries]] {{documentation}} [[Category:Templates]]

revision.text:
{{navbar|Glossary templates see also|plain=y}}
* {{tlx|glossary}} {{aka}} {{tlx|glossary start}} or {{tlx|glossary begin}} – Half of a template pair; uses {{tag|dl|o}} with a class to open the structured glossary definition list that {{tnull|glossary end}} closes. * {{tlx|glossary end}} – The other half of this template pair; uses {{tag|dl|c}} to close the definition list that {{tnull|glossary}} opens. * {{tlx|term}} – The glossary term to which the {{tnull|defn}} definition applies; a customized {{tag|dt|o}} with a class and an embedded {{tag|dfn|o}}. * {{tlx|defn}} – The definition that applies to the {{tnull|term}}; uses {{tag|dd|o}} with a class * {{tlx|ghat}} – a hatnote template properly formatted for the top of a {{tnull|defn}} definition * {{tlx|glossary link}} – meta-template for creating shortcut templates for linking to definitions in specific glossaries * [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Glossaries]] {{documentation}} [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

{{navbar|Glossary templates see also|plain=y}}
* {{tlx|glossary}} {{aka}} {{tlx|glossary start}} or {{tlx|glossary begin}} – Half of a template pair; uses {{tag|dl|o}} with a class to open the structured glossary definition list that {{tnull|glossary end}} closes. * {{tlx|glossary end}} – The other half of this template pair; uses {{tag|dl|c}} to close the definition list that {{tnull|glossary}} opens. * {{tlx|term}} – The glossary term to which the {{tnull|defn}} definition applies; a customized {{tag|dt|o}} with a class and an embedded {{tag|dfn|o}}. * {{tlx|defn}} – The definition that applies to the {{tnull|term}}; uses {{tag|dd|o}} with a class * {{tlx|ghat}} – a hatnote template properly formatted for the top of a {{tnull|defn}} definition * {{tlx|glossary link}} – meta-template for creating shortcut templates for linking to definitions in specific glossaries * [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Glossaries]] {{documentation}} [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Glossary_templates_see_also here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{navbar|Glossary templates see also|plain=y}}
* {{tlx|glossary}} {{aka}} {{tlx|glossary start}} or {{tlx|glossary begin}} – Half of a template pair; uses {{tag|dl|o}} with a class to open the structured glossary definition list that {{tnull|glossary end}} closes. * {{tlx|glossary end}} – The other half of this template pair; uses {{tag|dl|c}} to close the definition list that {{tnull|glossary}} opens. * {{tlx|term}} – The glossary term to which the {{tnull|defn}} definition applies; a customized {{tag|dt|o}} with a class and an embedded {{tag|dfn|o}}. * {{tlx|defn}} – The definition that applies to the {{tnull|term}}; uses {{tag|dd|o}} with a class * {{tlx|ghat}} – a hatnote template properly formatted for the top of a {{tnull|defn}} definition * {{tlx|glossary link}} – meta-template for creating shortcut templates for linking to definitions in specific glossaries * [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Glossaries]] {{documentation}} [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.text:
{{navbar|Glossary templates see also|plain=y}}
* {{tlx|glossary}} {{aka}} {{tlx|glossary start}} or {{tlx|glossary begin}} – Half of a template pair; uses {{tag|dl|o}} with a class to open the structured glossary definition list that {{tnull|glossary end}} closes. * {{tlx|glossary end}} – The other half of this template pair; uses {{tag|dl|c}} to close the definition list that {{tnull|glossary}} opens. * {{tlx|term}} – The glossary term to which the {{tnull|defn}} definition applies; a customized {{tag|dt|o}} with a class and an embedded {{tag|dfn|o}}. * {{tlx|defn}} – The definition that applies to the {{tnull|term}}; uses {{tag|dd|o}} with a class * {{tlx|ghat}} – a hatnote template properly formatted for the top of a {{tnull|defn}} definition * {{tlx|glossary link}} – meta-template for creating shortcut templates for linking to definitions in specific glossaries * [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Glossaries]] {{documentation}} [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
